<?php /* * This file is part of Psy Shell. * * (c) 2012-2026 Justin Hileman * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Psy\ExecutionLoop; use Psy\Shell; use Psy\ShellLogger; /** * Input logging listener. * * Logs user code input to a ShellLogger. */ class InputLoggingListener extends AbstractListener { private ShellLogger $logger; /** * @param ShellLogger $logger */ public function __construct(ShellLogger $logger) { $this->logger = $logger; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public static function isSupported(): bool { return true; } /** * {@inheritdoc} */ public function onInput(Shell $shell, string $input) { $this->logger->logInput($input); return null; } }
